text_block_list.text:
I came to watch Mihono Bourbon's dance lesson.
But, for whatever reason, she's just staring at
herself in the mirror.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Processing information. All clear. No
irregularities have been detected.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Situational analysis based on personage,
location, and other factors. Examining all
possibilities...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Processing complete. Verdict—my face is scary.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. I didn't notice you there.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes, my face. I was walking through the shopping
district earlier, and a baby started to cry after our
eyes met.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Based on the circumstances, I have come to the
conclusion that I have a "scary face."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Is that true? I cannot identify any other
explanations.

It doesn't look like her feelings are hurt from the
baby crying, but it does look like it's weighing on
her mind.
choice_data_list: The baby was probably just in a bad mood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I see... I failed to take into account the other
party's disposition.

She looks at her face in the mirror again and rubs
her cheeks.
A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I made the baby cry again.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I cannot tell babies' faces apart, but I determined
that it was the same baby as before based on the
parents' faces.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I identified the baby's emotional state as being
one of "enjoyment" until it saw my face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have determined that the cause of this lies with
me.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Bourbon!
Oh, you're here with your trainer too! Hello!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Yes. Hello, Nishino Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Er... Did something happen? You both look
concerned.
Nishino Flower seems worried, so I fill her in.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Thus, the problem lies with me. That is my
conclusion.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmm... I see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, Bourbon, what did you think when you saw
the baby?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Its body was small and without power. All
movements were limited. Overall, I determined it
to be "weak."

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Mhmm. So, you're saying you felt the desire to
protect it!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Its body was soft and lacking durability, and its
big, round eyes were staring intently at me...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh. So, you're saying the baby was cute!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...I see. Yes. Put simply, that may be the case.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe you should turn those feelings into a
great big smile!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: A smile...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Babies are always looking closely at the people
around them, and they change their facial
expressions accordingly!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
A baby that lived in my neighborhood was the
same way, so I'm sure that you can get this baby
to smile too!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...I see. So in other words, they attempt to copy
the expressions of others.
choice_data_list: Try giving the baby a smile next time!

Try showing the baby a bunch of different faces
next time!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Information updated based on new data. Will
verify during next encounter.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much, both of you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, good luck!
Some time later...

Mihono Bourbon runs up to me one day while I'm
out and about in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Trainer.
choice_data_list: Are you out shopping too, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I came here to execute operation "don't
make the baby cry."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Here is my report.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Result—success. I was able to extract a "smile"
from the baby.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed. The baby's smile was, well...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: It was... very cute.

She probably doesn't even realize it, but Mihono
Bourbon is still smiling now as if that baby was
right in front of her.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Now I understand. This warrants more
investigation into and analysis of different
patterns of interaction.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Information updated based on new data. Will
verify during next encounter.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hehe, good luck.
Some days later...

While I'm out and about in the shopping district, I
spot Mihono Bourbon alongside a couple with a
baby.

Just as I'm about to call out to her, she notices
me.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Perfect timing, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I came here to execute operation "make
many faces."

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: I'm ready to report the results.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I was only able to produce the "smile" expression
and could not carry out the "anger" or "sadness"
expressions.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I do not know. When I smiled and received one in
return, I perceived a sort of warm feeling inside of
my chest region.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
The creation of other facial expressions became
difficult following this.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Cause unknown. Expression remained stuck on
smile. I believe some kind of error may have
occurred in my facial muscles or chest area.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Puzzling. Clarification required.

Mihono Bourbon is deep in thought with a strange
look on her face. It's not really something that
needs to be explained.

Reasons like "I just wanted the baby to keep
smiling" or "I was drawn in by the baby's smile"
are sufficient.

I decide to wait in anticipation for the day that
she reaches an answer like that for herself.
